summary: Terms page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with correct palette, typography, and layout. All required content sections are present with proper hierarchy and the shared legal footer contract is fulfilled.

violations.description: Some text appears to use a slightly lighter shade than the specified primary ink color #1f1b18, though contrast remains acceptable

actions: Verify all text uses the exact primary ink color #1f1b18 as specified in the manifesto
Confirm the effective date '2026-05-03' aligns with the current legal posture timeline
